# Surface Waves

**Summary**: Seismic waves that travel along the surface of the Earth, often causing noise in exploration.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] analyzed how near-surface diffractors scatter surface wave energy.

## Scientific Context

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] The study focuses on how diffracted energy from these waves complicates signal interpretation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Near-surface diffractors can scatter the surface wave energy emanating from the seismic source. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 83]])
